tr_te.description: Maximum RepetitionTime and EchoTime values in milliseconds

image_type_exclusions.description: Image types to exclude from filtering

series_desc_exclusions.description: Series description substrings to exclude from filtering

similarity_threshold.description: Minimum similarity threshold (0.0-1.0) for sequence descriptions within a group

contrast_agent_tags.description: DICOM tags used to identify contrast agent presence

dynamic_markers.description: Series description keywords indicating dynamic/temporal sequences

keep_largest_size_group.description: When multiple image sizes exist, keep only the size group with most files

min_slice_count.description: Minimum acceptable number of slices per temporal position

min_temporal_positions.description: Minimum number of temporal positions (phases) required

folder_name_similarity_threshold.description: Minimum similarity threshold (0.0-1.0) for folder names across sequences

stop_before_pixels.description: Whether to stop reading DICOM files before pixel data (faster, but less complete)

natural_sorting.description: Enable natural sorting (e.g., '2' before '10') for file ordering

dicom_root.description: Root directory containing per-center DICOM input folders

results_dir.description: Root directory for NIfTI output; images and metadata are written under <nifti_root>/<center>/
